# IVX Blueprint v5 — force deploy 2026-07-01T22:15:00Z — commit 28bb5d7
services:
  - type: web
    name: ivx-holdings-platform
    repo: https://github.com/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest
    branch: main
    runtime: docker
    dockerfilePath: ./Dockerfile
    dockerContext: .
    dockerCommand: node /app/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs /app/server.ts
    plan: starter
    # IVX: auto-deploy on every push to main (owner-requested).
    autoDeployTrigger: commit
    healthCheckPath: /health
    domains:
      - api.ivxholding.com
    renderSubdomainPolicy: disabled
    disk:
      name: ivx-holdings-data
      mountPath: /app/data
      sizeGB: 1
    envVars:
      - key: NODE_ENV
        value: production
      - key: HOST
        value: 0.0.0.0
      - key: PORT
        value: 3000
      - key: CHAT_DATABASE_PATH
        value: /app/data/chat-room.sqlite
      - key: IVX_DATA_DIR
        value: /app/data
      - key: CHAT_ALLOWED_ORIGINS
        value: https://chat.ivxholding.com,https://api.ivxholding.com,https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com,https://ivx-holdings-chat-frontend.onrender.com

        value: /socket.io
      - key: EXPO_PUBLIC_APP_ENV
        value: production
      - key: API_BASE_URL
        value: https://api.ivxholding.com

The push to GitHub succeeded (`b8b0d658` on main), but Render is still serving the previous commit `227a5bb3` (bootTime 04:05:42 UTC, ~10h ago). The auto-deploy either hasn't triggered or is still building. I can't force a Render redeploy from inside the sandbox without the Render API key. Here is the honest final report:


Honest constraint: I will not fabricate a deploy ID or claim "VERIFIED" when live is still on the old commit. The code is merged on GitHub; the only remaining step is getting Render to pick up `b8b0d658`.

Want me to wait and re-poll, or do you want to provide the Render API token so I can force the deploy and verify?

responseMessageContents.title: Updated the digital helper's rules and sent out new website changes.
responseMessageContents.description: The digital helper was given new instructions to work more independently. The latest improvements have been saved, and we are now waiting for the live website to update with these changes.
